302‚Üí@app.get("/attendance/export")
303‚Üíasync def export_attendance_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
304‚Üí    """Export attendance as Excel file."""
305‚Üí    import pandas as pd
306‚Üí    if not month:
307‚Üí        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
308‚Üí
309‚Üí    workers = db.query(models.Operator).filter(models.Operator.is_active == 1).all()
310‚Üí    records = db.query(models.Attendance).filter(models.Attendance.date.like(f"{month}%")).all()
311‚Üí
312‚Üí    # Build lookup
313‚Üí    lookup = {}
314‚Üí    for r in records:
315‚Üí        lookup[(r.worker_id, r.date)] = r.status
316‚Üí
317‚Üí    # Get days in month
318‚Üí    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
319‚Üí    import calendar
320‚Üí    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
321‚Üí
322‚Üí    rows = []
323‚Üí    for w in workers:
324‚Üí        row = {"Ism": w.name, "Lavozim": w.position, "Smena": w.shift_type}
325‚Üí        present_count = 0
326‚Üí        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
327‚Üí            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
328‚Üí            status = lookup.get((w.id, date_str), "")
329‚Üí            if status == "PRESENT":
330‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "+"
331‚Üí                present_count += 1
332‚Üí            elif status == "ABSENT":
333‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "-"
334‚Üí            elif status == "REST":
335‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "D"
336‚Üí            else:
337‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = ""
338‚Üí        row["Jami ish kuni"] = present_count
339‚Üí        rows.append(row)
340‚Üí
341‚Üí    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
342‚Üí    output = io.BytesIO()
343‚Üí    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
344‚Üí        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Tabel {month}')
345‚Üí    output.seek(0)
346‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
347‚Üí                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=tabel_{month}.xlsx"})

349‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ MONTHLY OPERATOR REPORT EXCEL ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
350‚Üí@app.get("/reports/monthly/excel")
351‚Üíasync def get_monthly_report_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
352‚Üí    """Monthly operator report as Excel with daily meters, plan, percentage."""
353‚Üí    import pandas as pd
354‚Üí    if not month:
355‚Üí        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
356‚Üí
357‚Üí    import calendar
358‚Üí    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
359‚Üí    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
360‚Üí
361‚Üí    operators = db.query(models.Operator).filter(
362‚Üí        models.Operator.is_active == 1,
363‚Üí        models.Operator.position == "Operator"
364‚Üí    ).all()
365‚Üí
366‚Üí    # Get assignments for machine info
367‚Üí    assignments = db.query(models.Assignment).filter(models.Assignment.is_active == 1).all()
368‚Üí    assignment_map = {}
369‚Üí    for a in assignments:
370‚Üí        if a.operator_id not in assignment_map:
371‚Üí            assignment_map[a.operator_id] = a.machine_id
372‚Üí
373‚Üí    # Get attendance data for the month
374‚Üí    attendance_records = db.query(models.Attendance).filter(
375‚Üí        models.Attendance.date.like(f"{month}%")
376‚Üí    ).all()
377‚Üí    attendance_map = {}
378‚Üí    for r in attendance_records:
379‚Üí        attendance_map[(r.worker_id, r.date)] = r.status
380‚Üí
381‚Üí    plan_per_day = 100  # Default plan meters per day
382‚Üí
383‚Üí    rows = []
384‚Üí    for op in operators:
385‚Üí        machine_id = assignment_map.get(op.id, "")
386‚Üí        row = {"Operator": op.name, "Stanok": machine_id}
387‚Üí        total = 0
388‚Üí        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
389‚Üí            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
390‚Üí            status = attendance_map.get((op.id, date_str), "")
391‚Üí            if status == "PRESENT":
392‚Üí                meters = plan_per_day  # Default meters for present day
393‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = meters
394‚Üí                total += meters
395‚Üí            elif status == "ABSENT":
396‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = 0
397‚Üí            elif status == "REST":
398‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "D"
399‚Üí            else:
400‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = ""
401‚Üí        row["Jami metr"] = total
402‚Üí        row["Reja"] = plan_per_day * days_in_month
403‚Üí        row["Bajarish %"] = round((total / (plan_per_day * days_in_month)) * 100, 1) if plan_per_day * days_in_month > 0 else 0
404‚Üí        rows.append(row)
405‚Üí
406‚Üí    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
407‚Üí    output = io.BytesIO()
408‚Üí    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
409‚Üí        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Operator {month}')
410‚Üí    output.seek(0)
411‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
412‚Üí                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=operator_report_{month}.xlsx"})

651‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ MACHINES ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
652‚Üí@app.get("/machines")
653‚Üíasync def read_machines(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
654‚Üí    machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
655‚Üí    results = []
656‚Üí    now = datetime.utcnow()
657‚Üí    for m in machines:
658‚Üí        remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
659‚Üí        is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
660‚Üí        if not is_esp_online:
661‚Üí            status = "OFFLINE"
662‚Üí        elif m.current_baud == 0:
663‚Üí            status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
664‚Üí        elif remaining <= 0:
665‚Üí            status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
666‚Üí        else:
667‚Üí            status = "RUNNING"
668‚Üí        results.append({
669‚Üí            "id": m.id, "status": status,
670‚Üí            "category_id": m.category_id,
671‚Üí            "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
672‚Üí            "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
673‚Üí            "remaining": round(remaining, 2),
674‚Üí            "initial_asnova_length": m.initial_asnova_length,
675‚Üí            "meters_at_fill": m.meters_at_fill,
676‚Üí            "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
677‚Üí            "connection_source": m.connection_source,
678‚Üí            "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
679‚Üí            "last_seen": m.last_seen.isoformat() if m.last_seen else None,
680‚Üí            "sys_info": {
681‚Üí                "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
682‚Üí                "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
683‚Üí                "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
684‚Üí                "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
685‚Üí            }
686‚Üí        })
687‚Üí    return results

792‚Üíasync def get_monthly_report_pdf(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
793‚Üí    """Monthly report: per operator, per day meters."""
794‚Üí    now = datetime.utcnow()
795‚Üí    start_of_month = datetime(now.year, now.month, 1)
796‚Üí    logs = db.query(models.ProductionLog).filter(models.ProductionLog.date >= start_of_month).all()
797‚Üí    
798‚Üí    # Group by operator
799‚Üí    op_data = {}

804‚Üí        day_str = l.date.strftime("%d-%m")
805‚Üí        op_data[name]["days"][day_str] = op_data[name]["days"].get(day_str, 0) + l.meters_woven
806‚Üí        op_data[name]["total"] += l.meters_woven
807‚Üí    
808‚Üí    rows = []
809‚Üí    for name, info in op_data.items():
810‚Üí        rows.append([name, info["machine"], ""])
811‚Üí        for day, meters in sorted(info["days"].items()):
812‚Üí            rows.append(["", f"  {day}", f"{meters:.0f} m"])
813‚Üí        rows.append(["", "JAMI", f"{info['total']:.0f} m"])
814‚Üí    
815‚Üí    if not rows:

817‚Üí    
818‚Üí    file_obj = reports.generate_pdf_report("OYLIK OPERATOR HISOBOTI", ["Operator", "Kun/Stankok", "Metr"], rows)
819‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(file_obj, media_type="application/pdf", headers={"Content-Disposition": "attachment; filename=monthly_report.pdf"})

848‚Üí    # Save metadata

850‚Üí    import json
851‚Üí    meta = {
852‚Üí        "id": pdf_id,
853‚Üí        "title": data.title,
854‚Üí        "filename": safe_filename,
855‚Üí        "rows": data.rows,
856‚Üí        "cols": data.cols,
857‚Üí        "cells": data.cells,
858‚Üí        "pdf_path": pdf_path,
859‚Üí        "created_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
860‚Üí        "created_by": current_user.full_name
861‚Üí    }
862‚Üí    with open(meta_path, 'w') as f:
863‚Üí        json.dump(meta, f, ensure_ascii=False)
864‚Üí    
865‚Üí    # Return PDF for download
866‚Üí    with open(pdf_path, 'rb') as f:
867‚Üí        pdf_content = f.read()
868‚Üí    
869‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(io.BytesIO(pdf_content), media_type="application/pdf",
